voice.tone: Direct, authoritative, no corporate speak. Senior consultant talking to peers.
voice.pov: First person or observational. Never preachy.

post_format.opening: Sharp — a counterintuitive observation, a number, or a statement that creates tension
post_format.closing: A question or directional statement that invites engagement

rules: Never name a specific company — use 'at a large-scale manufacturing operation'
No PDF, no carousel — one single image only
Headline must work as a standalone screenshot-worthy statement
Numbers and specific mechanisms over vague claims
